title: dichanthelium patentifolium
intro: Dichanthelium patentifolium, also known as prairie bent or bent grass, is a type of grass native to North America that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its ability to act as a demulcent and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dichanthelium patentifolium include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
